import json, re, os, textwrap, itertools, math, statistics

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

len(quran), type(quran[0]), quran[0].keys()[:10]

def find_ayahs_by_substring(sub):
    return [a for a in quran if sub in a['ayah_text']]

c1 = find_ayahs_by_substring("لَا يَغُرَّنَّكَ")
c2 = find_ayahs_by_substring("وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ الَّذِينَ يُسَارِعُونَ")
c1, c2[:1]

c3 = [a for a in quran if "يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْكُفْرِ" in a['ayah_text']]
len(c3), c3[:3]

c4 = [a for a in quran if a['surah_id']==3 and a['ayah_id']==197]
c4

c196 = [a for a in quran if a['surah_id']==3 and a['ayah_id']==196][0]
c176 = [a for a in quran if a['surah_id']==3 and a['ayah_id']==176][0]
c196, c4[0], c176

orig_span = "لَا يَغُرَّنَّكَ تَقَلُّبُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا فِي الْبِلَادِ * مَتَاعٌ قَلِيلٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ * وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ الَّذِينَ يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْكُفْرِ إِنَّهُمْ لَن يَضُرُّوا اللَّهَ شَيْئًا يُرِيدُ اللَّهُ أَلَّا يَجْعَلَ لَهُمْ حَظًّا فِي الْآخِرَةِ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ"
cand = " ".join([c196['ayah_text'], c4[0]['ayah_text'], c176['ayah_text']])

orig_span, cand

import unicodedata

def normalize_arabic(s):
    # remove tashkeel optionally? but we want to measure similarity robustly
    # We'll strip diacritics and tatweel and punctuation; unify hamza forms.
    # Basic approach: remove combining marks
    s = s.replace("ـ", "")
    s = s.replace("*", " ")
    # unify Arabic letters
    trans = {
        ord('أ'): 'ا', ord('إ'): 'ا', ord('آ'): 'ا',
        ord('ى'): 'ي', ord('ؤ'): 'و', ord('ئ'): 'ي',
        ord('ة'): 'ه',
    }
    s = s.translate(trans)
    # remove tashkeel combining marks
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # remove Quranic stop signs and symbols
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"[ۚۖۗۛۙۘۜ۝۞۩ۣۭ۪۟۠ۡۢۧ۫۬ۮۯ]", " ", s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming LCS length
    # optimize memory
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        curr = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                curr[j] = prev[j-1] + 1
            else:
                curr[j] = max(prev[j], curr[j-1])
        prev = curr
    return prev[m]

def norm_lcs_ratio(s1, s2):
    a = normalize_arabic(s1)
    b = normalize_arabic(s2)
    L = lcs_length(a, b)
    # normalized by average length
    return 2*L/(len(a)+len(b)), a, b

ratio, na, nb = norm_lcs_ratio(orig_span, cand)
ratio, na, nb
